gate_vector_schema.lineage_current_condition: lineage_current must pass when topology_mutation_occurs is true; otherwise lineage_current is not_applicable

t4_deferral.rationale: T4 is the recurrence/no-mutation baseline and must be run before interpreting topology-free recurrence as stronger than ID4.
